title: lathyrus tenuior
intro: Lathyrus tenuior, also known as the slender pea or narrow-leaved pea, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use as a natural remedy for various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Lathyrus tenuior include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory issues, and act as a diuretic, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Lathyrus tenuior include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, from mild to severe.
